scenarios.name: csv-summary
scenarios.prompt: Analyze data/sales.csv. Show the number of rows, columns, and summarize the revenue column.
scenarios.description: Data-analyst must show query/code and interpret the results

scenarios.name: csv-top-products
scenarios.prompt: Which product in data/sales.csv has the highest total revenue? Show your work.
scenarios.description: Data-analyst must produce code and a result, not just describe
